source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the figure shown, when the transistor operates in the amplification state, the currents at each pin are \( I_{1} = 5.1 \, \mathrm{mA}, I_{2} = 5 \, \mathrm{mA}, I_{3} = 0.1 \, \mathrm{mA} \). The correct statement is
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: The transistor is PNP type, pin 1 is the emitter
